report.title: e-Surveyor: Host plants
report.description: Report for a user's species data host plants in e-Surveyor
report.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT mt.host_plants AS host_plant, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS occurrence_count, COUNT(DISTINCT o.taxon_meaning_id) AS species_count FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id AND cttl.taxon_rank_sort_order IN (290, 300) JOIN esurveyor.moth_traits mt ON mt.tvk=cttl.external_key #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# AND mt.host_plants IS NOT NULL #filters# GROUP BY 1 ), ranked AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN host_plant_count > 7 AND host_plant_rank > 6 THEN 'Other' ELSE host_plant END AS host_plant, occurrence_count, species_count FROM ( SELECT host_plant, occurrence_count, species_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY species_count DESC, host_plant ) AS host_plant_rank, COUNT(*) OVER () AS host_plant_count FROM base ) s ) SELECT host_plant, SUM(occurrence_count) AS occurrence_count, SUM(species_count) AS species_count FROM ranked
